description.value: Fleshcraft Elixirs Fleshcrafting, the cousin of true fleshwarping, focuses on modifying only a portion of the subject for a particular task. While fleshcrafting normally involves changing the subjectâs body permanently with a graft, fleshcraft elixirs can enact a similar temporary monstrous change. The following fleshcraft is available only in elixir form and cannot be created as a graft. Price 1,400 gp; Duration 10 minutes; Saving Throw DC 20 DESCRIPTION Numerous malformed eyes grow on the subjectâs head. EFFECTS The creature gains all-around vision and canât be flanked. Penalty: The subject is overwhelmed by sensory information, leaving it dazzled for the duration. CREATION REQUIREMENTS Cost 700 gp; Feats Fleshwarper; Skills Craft (alchemy) 13 ranks; Heal DC 24
